response.original_title: Black Inventions: Shaping the Modern World
response.overview: Black Inventions: Shaping the Modern World is an inspiring documentary that explores the stories of seven African American innovators whose groundbreaking inventions helped shape the modern world and continue to influence our daily lives.
response.tagline: The minds history overlooked. The inventions the world could never live without.
response.title: Black Inventions: Shaping the Modern World
